start.welcome:
Hello! 🌸

«Himoya» is the official bot of Termez Branch of Tashkent State Medical University, designed to protect students' and staff's rights and prevent harassment, pressure and violence.

📜 Based on: Order No. 150 of the Ministry of Higher Education, Science and Innovation of Uzbekistan, dated April 20, 2026.

Here you can:
• 🔒 Submit an anonymous report
• 📋 Check report status
• 📞 Get hotline contacts
• 📖 Learn about your rights
